import React from "react"; import { LinearGradient } from "expo-linear-gradient"; export default function WhySection({ onOpenDemo }) { return (
{/* Background image + overlay */}

Why CineGate

Public film licensing redesigned for African cinema.

{/* Card 1 */}

Public screenings{`\n`}are complicated

  • › Licensing is unclear
  • › Negotiations are slow
  • › Many venues screen films informally
{/* Card 2 (highlight) */}

Pay once.{`\n`} Screen once.

  • › Download licensed film
  • › Screen it one time
  • › Access automatically expires
{/* Card 3 */}

More African films{`\n`}on more screens

  • › Legal access for venues
  • › Revenue for filmmakers
  • › Cultural visibility globally

Experience the one-time screening model

{/* CTA button (same vibe as hero) */}

"absolute", inset: 0, background: "radial-gradient(ellipse at center, rgba(0,0,0,0.35) 0%, rgba(0,0,0,0.68) 70%, rgba(0,0,0,0.78) 100%)", }, inner: { position: "relative", zIndex: 2, maxWidth: 1100, 12px 40px rgba(0,0,0,0.45)", }, cardOuterHot: { background: "linear-gradient(180deg, rgba(240,154,43,0.55) 0%, rgba(240,154,43,0.18) 45%, rgba(255,255,255,0.08) 100%)", boxShadow: "0 14px 55px rgba(240,154,43,0.16), 0 12px 40px rgba(0,0,0,0.45)", }, cardInner: { borderRadius: 16, padding: "28px 22px", minHeight: 340, background: "rgba(0,0,0,0.42)", border: "1px solid rgba(255,255,255,0.08)", backdropFilter: "blur(6px)", textAlign: "center", }, cardInnerHot: { border: "1px solid rgba(240,154,43,0.18)", background: "rgba(0,0,0,0.36)", }, icon: { width: 64, height: right: 1, top: 1, height: 18, borderTopLeftRadius: 12, borderTopRightRadius: 12, backgroundColor: "rgba(255,255,255,0.14)", }, ctaRow: { display: "flex", alignItems: "center", justifyContent:
